name: Garlic-Ginger Chicken with Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch medallions
3 1/2 lbs Fryer chicken, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine the soy sauce, sherry, brown sugar, and ground ginger in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture over the potatoes and chicken cubes in a baking dish. Cover with plastic wrap.
3. Marinate for 1 hour at room temperature.
4. Turn the chicken and potatoes over; marinate an additional hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
6. Bake for 25 minutes, then turn the potato and chicken over in the dish and baste with a little of the reserved marinade.
7. Continue baking for another 30 minutes until no pink remains when the chicken is poked with a fork.
8. Remove the dish from the oven and arrange the potatoes around the cooked chicken on a serving dish.
9. If desired, serve over steamed white rice. Garnish with finely diced green onions.
Note: This recipe serves 4.
